controls.verifier_policy: explicit two-stage confirm-first verify/repair with deterministic temporal-candidate hints and structured model event table for unknown infrequent aggregation

hypothesis: Adding a structured model event table before verify/repair improves infrequent temporal aggregation versus deterministic candidates alone, without regressing the 14-record guardrail slice.
metric_caveats: Temporal candidates and the model event table are diagnostic hints; gan_frequency_deterministic_v1 scoring is unchanged.
This variant adds one extra model call versus temporal-candidates v1.1 verify-repair.
Monthly-frequency, Purist category, and Pragmatic category metrics are benchmark-facing on this slice only.
Normalized-label exact, schema validity, abstention, evidence support, temporal-candidate coverage, event-table coverage, and verifier decisions are diagnostic.
Do not extrapolate slice metrics to full-validation performance.
This is not published Gan benchmark reproduction.
